gigapan.description:
'Winter in the MQ' is a fun event in the courtyard of the MuseumsQuartier. There is a curling rink (field? pitch? what do curlers curl in? I am only used to curling from the command line :-), and an RC car track, and booths 
where  you can get Punsch in convenient mugs.  I like punsch...and I like standing in the chill air looking at the world through a robot, with my punsch on a ledge, the shutter remote in one hand and focusing with the other 
hand.

Taken from the steps of the Leopold museum. Manual exposure, but still some vignetting.  I think because the camera adjusts the white balance. I have raw versions of the source images, and I should check.
